word: H2893 - טׇהֳרָה - ṭohŏrâh - toh-or-aw' - [idiom] is cleansed

sections.paragraph:
Original: טהרה

Transliteration: ṭohŏrâh

Phonetic: toh-or-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. purifying, cleansing, purification, purity, cleanness
    1. purifying, menstruation
    2. cleansing, purification

Origin: from H2892

TWOT entry: 792c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
